item.name: Stickleback
item.description:
This moderately sized wavekin is easily identified by its prickly spines.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The row of pointed spines that adorn this wavekin's back act as a deterrent to predators. Incidentally, the appellation “stickleback” is used to deride the startling fashion choices made by wayward youths.
